steps.title: Magic Words
steps.body:
Just like in English, polite phrases open doors everywhere! 🚪✨

These words will make every interaction smoother and earn you respect from native speakers.

steps.title: Please & Thank You
steps.body:
The two most important phrases:

• **Por favor** - Please (literally: 'for favor')
• **Gracias** - Thank you
• **Muchas gracias** - Thank you very much
• **Mil gracias** - Thanks a million (literally: 'a thousand thanks')

steps.title: You're Welcome
steps.body:
When someone thanks you:

• **De nada** - You're welcome (literally: 'of nothing')
• **No hay de qué** - Don't mention it
• **Con gusto** - With pleasure (common in Latin America)
steps.audioPhrase: De nada. No hay de qué. Con gusto.

steps.title: Sorry & Excuse Me
steps.body:
• **Lo siento** - I'm sorry (for something you did)
• **Perdón** - Pardon/Excuse me (to get attention or pass by)
• **Disculpe** - Excuse me (more formal)
• **Con permiso** - Excuse me (when passing through)
steps.audioPhrase: Lo siento. Perdón. Disculpe. Con permiso.

steps.title: Yes & No
steps.body:
• **Sí** - Yes
• **No** - No
• **Claro** - Of course/Sure
• **Vale** - Okay (very common in Spain)
• **Bueno** - Okay/Good (common in Latin America)

steps.title: Super Useful Extras
steps.body:
These will help you in any situation:

• **No entiendo** - I don't understand
• **¿Puede repetir?** - Can you repeat?
• **Más despacio, por favor** - More slowly, please
• **No hablo español** - I don't speak Spanish
steps.audioPhrase: No entiendo. ¿Puede repetir? Más despacio, por favor.

steps.title: 🎉 ¡Muy bien!
steps.body:
You now know the essential polite phrases! Using these will make a great impression.

**Challenge:** Use 'gracias' and 'por favor' at least 5 times today!
